//: PWA installability gate (HMAI-350). Lighthouse 12 removed the whole PWA category, so we pin @lhci/cli@0.13 (Lighthouse 11) and assert the surviving `installable-manifest` audit — a valid, installable manifest (name, 192+512 icons, start_url, standalone) scores 1; a regression drops it and fails the merge. Run against the already-running Symfony server in the e2e-playwright job.
